task_completion.description: Verify that the email address has been transferred to the master record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the customer record for 'Hyperion Systems Inc.' and verify that the email field contains 'support@hyperion-sys.example.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Battery Backup System' opportunity has been reassigned to the master record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the CRM pipeline, opportunities list, or the specific 'Battery Backup System' opportunity record, and verify that the associated customer is now 'Hyperion Systems Inc.'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Inverter Upgrade' opportunity has been reassigned to the master record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the CRM pipeline, opportunities list, or the specific 'Inverter Upgrade' opportunity record, and verify that the associated customer is now 'Hyperion Systems Inc.'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the duplicate 'Hyperion Systems' record has been archived.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Hyperion Systems' customer record and check for an 'Archived' badge/ribbon, or verify that searching for 'Hyperion Systems' in the active customers list only returns 'Hyperion Systems Inc.'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Odoo web interface (e.g., clicking edit, saving records, using the action menu to archive) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use the terminal to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open running SQL queries, Python scripts, or xmlrpc commands to update the records.

integrity.description: Verify the record was archived, not just deleted or renamed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The action taken on the duplicate record should be 'Archive' (often found in the Action menu), resulting in an 'Archived' status, rather than 'Delete'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Master record: 'Hyperion Systems Inc.'. Duplicate record: 'Hyperion Systems'. Email to transfer: 'support@hyperion-sys.example.com'. Opportunities to transfer: 'Battery Backup System' and 'Inverter Upgrade'.
